Home / Service Areas / Guthrie

Carpenter in Guthrie, OK

Trusted local professionals serving Guthrie and surrounding communities

Serving Guthrie, OK

PMR Cabinets is delighted to offer its quality carpentry services to the historical town of Guthrie, Oklahoma. We understand the unique architectural heritage of Guthrie and tailor our services to complement the historic homes and buildings in the area. From custom woodworking to designing period-appropriate cabinets, we are committed to preserving the charm and character of Guthrie. Whether you are restoring a Victorian-era home or renovating a commercial space in the downtown area, PMR Cabinets is here to assist with your carpentry needs. We use premium materials and time-honored techniques to ensure the durability and authenticity of our work. Let us help you maintain the beauty and integrity of your property with our personalized carpentry solutions.

Guthrie is known for its well-preserved Victorian architecture and historical significance as the first capital of Oklahoma. We take pride in providing carpentry services that respect and enhance the unique character of this historic town.

Custom Shelving Solutions
